Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
    IsBlank(txtSignupUsername.Text) ||
    IsBlank(txtSignupEmail.Text) ||
    IsBlank(txtSignupPassword.Text) ||
    IsBlank(txtSignupFirstName.Text) ||
    IsBlank(txtSignupStation.Text),

    Notify("Please complete all fields.", NotificationType.Error),

    If(
        !IsBlank(LookUp(ResponderDetails, Username = txtSignupUsername.Text)),
        Notify("Username already exists.", NotificationType.Error),

        If(
            !IsBlank(LookUp(ResponderDetails, Email = txtSignupEmail.Text)),
            Notify("Email already exists.", NotificationType.Error),

            Patch(
                ResponderDetails,
                Defaults(ResponderDetails),
                {
                    Username: txtSignupUsername.Text,
                    Email: txtSignupEmail.Text,
                    Password: txtSignupPassword.Text,
                    FirstName: txtSignupFirstName.Text,
                    StationName: txtSignupStation.Text
                }
            );

            Notify("Account created successfully!", NotificationType.Success);
            Navigate(SignUpSuccessScreen, ScreenTransition.Fade)
        )
    )
)
